attacking_style: Not an attacker; operates as a leadout specialist in sprint finishes, delivering riders in final kilometers.
team_tactics: Functions as a high-speed leadout train component, valued enough that rival teams utilize his services when their own trains falter.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where leadout work is decisive; likely struggles on climbs given pure leadout specialist profile.
vulnerability: Mountain stages and reduced bunch finishes where leadout skills become irrelevant; reliant on team sprint objectives.
key_patterns: Provides leadout services across team boundaries, indicating respected positioning and pace-setting ability.
Valued by rival sprinters as alternative leadout option when native trains fail.
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to assess trajectory, though leadout capability rated strong
